name: LED Dotless Linear Strip Lights – Single Colour – Water Resistant
description: LED Dotless Linear Strip Lights, This continuous LED strip is the perfect solution for a wide variety of applications, especially for those installations where you don’t want to see the individual diodes. Requiring no diffusing lens makes the L-series installation even easier. Our L-Series Dotless LED strip lights are made with wire leads on both ends of each 16.4′ reel and can be cut every .7″(12VDC) or 1.78″ (24VDC), allowing you to cut pieces to the exact length that you need.
short_desc: Specifications: Dimensions: 11mm wide x 4mm thick x 5m long Cut Length: 12VDC: 0.7″ (17.85mm), 24VDC: 1.78″ (45.45mm) IP Rating: IP65 (Suitable for dry & damp locations) PCB Width: 8mm CRI: >90 Adhesive Backing: Yes (3M Adhesive) Mounting: Adhesive backing Input Voltage: 12VDC or 24VDC Beam Angle: 120° Dimmable: Yes Power Consumption: 12VDC: 3.7W/ft, 24VDC: 4.3W/ft Luminous Flux: 12VDC: 304 lm/ft, 24VDC: 425 lm/ft Max Run Length: 16.4 ft @ 24VDC Weight: 0.7 lbs per reel Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 years Certifications: UL Listed, RoHS

images.alt: RGB Colourful LED Strip Lights 220V/110V - 100 Meter IP68

meta_title: LED Dotless Linear Strip Lights – Single Colour – Water Resistant
